title: Many Gifts, One Church
summary: “And those members of the body, which we think to be less honourable, upon these we bestow more abundant honour; and our uncomely parts have more abundant comeliness.” (1 Corinthians 12:23). We all know that Jacob had 12 sons that they form the 12 tribes of Israel. When God spoke to Pharaoh, he said, “And thou shalt say unto Pharaoh, Thus saith the LORD, Israel is my son, even my firstborn. And I say unto thee, Let my son go, that he may serve me: and if thou refuse to let him go, behold, I will slay thy son, even thy firstborn. (Exodus 4:22, 23). God spoke, not of 12 sons, but one son, Israel. Just as 6000 demons spoke with one voice and one name, “Legion”, God spoke of 2 million souls as one, and with one name, Israel. Can we say together that we are the Apostolic Church of Jesus Christ!
